channel.title: IN-KluSo
channel.description: Signal intelligence for operators, analysts, and culturally literate professionals. Human-verified. SCI-scored. No noise. Free on your commute.
channel.itunes:summary: Signal intelligence for operators, analysts, and culturally literate professionals. Human-verified. SCI-scored. No noise. Free on your commute.
channel.itunes:author: Juan Camilo Echeverri · IN-KluSo

item.title: The 5x Trap · CORE-002
item.description: SCI 0.976 · HIGH · The structural trap in five-times leverage plays — why operators keep falling into the same capital destruction pattern and the mechanism that makes it invisible until it isn't.
item.itunes:summary: SCI 0.976 · HIGH · The structural trap in five-times leverage plays — why operators keep falling into the same capital destruction pattern and the mechanism that makes it invisible until it isn't.
item.itunes:author: Juan Camilo Echeverri

item.title: The Triple Break · CORE-001
item.description: SCI 0.908 · HIGH · Three simultaneous structural fractures in the US labor market — and why the conventional read misses all three mechanisms.
item.itunes:summary: SCI 0.908 · HIGH · Three simultaneous structural fractures in the US labor market — and why the conventional read misses all three mechanisms.
item.itunes:author: Juan Camilo Echeverri

item.title: The Human Authorship Seal · AXIS-002
item.description: SCI 0.952 · HIGH · How the collapse of AI content trust is creating a new premium layer for verified human authorship — and who is positioned to certify it.
item.itunes:summary: SCI 0.952 · HIGH · How the collapse of AI content trust is creating a new premium layer for verified human authorship — and who is positioned to certify it.
item.itunes:author: Juan Camilo Echeverri

item.title: The Trillion-Dollar Line Item · CORE-008
item.description: SCI 0.95 · HIGH · The infrastructure spending category that doesn't appear on any public budget — and the capital flows moving through it regardless.
item.itunes:summary: SCI 0.95 · HIGH · The infrastructure spending category that doesn't appear on any public budget — and the capital flows moving through it regardless.
item.itunes:author: Juan Camilo Echeverri

item.title: The Robot Wage · AXIS-005
item.description: SCI 0.94 · HIGH · The wage floor set by automation cost — and why human wages in certain categories are now structurally capped at the price of replacing the role with a machine.
item.itunes:summary: SCI 0.94 · HIGH · The wage floor set by automation cost — and why human wages in certain categories are now structurally capped at the price of replacing the role with a machine.
item.itunes:author: Juan Camilo Echeverri

item.title: The #1 Metro · NWA-GROUND-006
item.description: SCI 0.94 · HIGH · Northwest Arkansas ranked the #1 metro in the United States — the structural signals behind the ranking and what operators need to understand before the next move.
item.itunes:summary: SCI 0.94 · HIGH · Northwest Arkansas ranked the #1 metro in the United States — the structural signals behind the ranking and what operators need to understand before the next move.
item.itunes:author: Juan Camilo Echeverri

item.title: The Last Masthead · FLOW-003
item.description: SCI 0.91 · HIGH · The structural collapse of legacy media editorial infrastructure — and what the surviving mastheads have in common that has nothing to do with journalism quality.
item.itunes:summary: SCI 0.91 · HIGH · The structural collapse of legacy media editorial infrastructure — and what the surviving mastheads have in common that has nothing to do with journalism quality.
item.itunes:author: Juan Camilo Echeverri

item.title: The Credential Collapse · THRIVE-003
item.description: SCI 0.90 · HIGH · The four-year degree as job qualifier is unwinding — the mechanism behind employer defection from credential requirements and what replaces it structurally.
item.itunes:summary: SCI 0.90 · HIGH · The four-year degree as job qualifier is unwinding — the mechanism behind employer defection from credential requirements and what replaces it structurally.
item.itunes:author: Juan Camilo Echeverri

item.title: The Extraction Playbook · CORE-003
item.description: SCI 0.92 · HIGH · The repeating structural pattern behind resource extraction in emerging corridor economies — and the three signals that appear before the cycle turns.
item.itunes:summary: SCI 0.92 · HIGH · The repeating structural pattern behind resource extraction in emerging corridor economies — and the three signals that appear before the cycle turns.
item.itunes:author: Juan Camilo Echeverri

item.title: The Neighbor's Veto · MADRID-GROUND-002
item.description: SCI 0.90 · HIGH · Madrid's community governance mechanism that blocks urban development — the structural legal layer most operators entering the market don't see until it's too late.
item.itunes:summary: SCI 0.90 · HIGH · Madrid's community governance mechanism that blocks urban development — the structural legal layer most operators entering the market don't see until it's too late.
item.itunes:author: Juan Camilo Echeverri
